heading: Effect on other authority
label: 3385 Effect on other authority
text: This subchapter shall not limit the authority of the Secretary to reassign temporarily an air traffic controller to other duties with or without notice, in the interest of the safe or efficient separation and control of air traffic or the physical or mental health of a controller; or to reassign permanently or separate a controller under any other provision of law.
notes: References in TextFor definition of Secretary, referred to in text, see .section 2109 of this title
Amendments1980— substituted “Secretary” for “Secretary of Transportation”.Pub. L. 96–347
